title: AirTerminal
description: AirTerminal: A device used to regulate the volume of air to or from an air handling unit, variable air volume device or similar, to or from the occupied space. These devices may be ducted or connect directly to a plenum, in which case no duct connection will be present.

Location.description: The point in space for the location of the object. Node: 0D finite element for structural analysis. Node class contains positional information as well as orientation and support.

OrientationAngle.description: Controls the local plan orientation of the object. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

AirFlowRate.description: The volume of air being conveyed by the Duct per second (m3/s). Property has a quantity of type VolumetricFlowRate measured in [m³/s].

PressureDrop.description: The difference in total pressure between two points of a system measured in Pascals. Property has a quantity of type Pressure measured in [Pa].

ConnectedDuctProperties.description: The DuctSectionProperties for the duct connected to the air terminal.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
